steps.title: Spot the contrast structure
steps.content: The underlined sentence uses a direct parallel construction—”as loud as my father was quiet”—that juxtaposes opposite qualities to compare Uncle Katsuhisa and the narrator's father.

steps.title: Identify the sentence's function
steps.content: The sentence contrasts Uncle Katsuhisa's loudness with the narrator's father's quietness, showing how fundamentally different they are. The other three misidentify what the sentence does—describing topics not mentioned, suggesting unrelated feelings, or confusing description with dialogue. That matches choice C — C is correct.
